# Zenivra — AI Creator Platform

> Affordable, community-driven AI image and video generation for creators and teams.

Zenivra is an AI creator ecosystem combining image generation, a public gallery, a marketplace for prompts and styles, and creator tools.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product landing, live feed, pricing overview
- [Explore](/explore): Public community gallery of generated work
- [Models](/models): Catalog of available AI models
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Prompts, styles, LoRA packs
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and credits
- [Developers](/developers): API platform overview

## Optional
- [Terms](/legal/terms)
- [Privacy](/legal/privacy)
